title: Digital Marketing Course with AI
shortDescription: Learn digital marketing with AI tools, real campaigns, and portfolio projects
description: The Digital Marketing Course with AI at Pixl Pluz Academy is a comprehensive, agency-style training program designed to build job-ready skills in SEO, social media marketing, Google Ads, content strategy, email marketing, analytics, and AI-powered workflows. You will work on live projects, build a verified portfolio, and get career support from industry mentors.

curriculum.title: Module 1: Digital Marketing Fundamentals
curriculum.description: Build a clear map of how modern marketing works online. You will learn channels, funnels, buyer journeys, and how brands plan campaigns end to end. Set up a practical workspace and define audience personas so every later module connects to real business goals in Kochi and beyond.

curriculum.title: Module 2: SEO & Content Strategy
curriculum.description: Learn how search visibility and content work together. Practice keyword research with AI support, on-page optimisation, content calendars, and ethical link-building habits. Leave with a content plan you can defend in client or interview conversations.

curriculum.title: Module 3: Social Media Marketing
curriculum.description: Plan and run social presence that earns attention and converts. Cover organic posting systems, community habits, paid social structure, and short-form video that fits Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, and emerging formats used by growth teams.

curriculum.title: Module 4: Google Ads & Paid Media
curriculum.description: Build paid campaigns with clear structure, budgets, and measurement. Practise search, display, and remarketing setups, write stronger ad copy with AI assist, and learn how to read performance without guessing.

curriculum.title: Module 5: Email & CRM Marketing
curriculum.description: Design lifecycle emails that nurture leads and retain customers. Segment lists, map CRM automations, and write sequences that feel personal while staying measurable for small teams and growing brands.

curriculum.title: Module 6: Analytics & Reporting
curriculum.description: Turn numbers into decisions. Configure GA4, set conversion tracking, build simple dashboards, and use AI to surface insights you can present to mentors, clients, or hiring managers with confidence.

curriculum.title: Module 7: AI Tools for Marketers
curriculum.description: Use AI as a daily marketing teammate — not a shortcut that lowers quality. Build prompt systems for research, copy, creatives, and automation so you ship faster while keeping brand voice and review habits intact.

curriculum.title: Module 8: Capstone Campaign Project
curriculum.description: Ship a full-funnel campaign from brief to presentation. Combine strategy, creatives, channels, and reporting into a portfolio piece, then practise how to explain your work in interviews and counselling sessions.

faqs.q: Will I receive a certificate upon completion?
faqs.a: Yes, all students who complete the course and the final project receive a verified digital certificate from Pixl Pluz Academy.

faqs.q: What if I have questions during the course?
faqs.a: You will have access to your mentor through our student portal and weekly doubt-clearing sessions.

faqs.q: Can I access the course materials after completion?
faqs.a: Yes, you get lifetime access to all course materials including future updates.

faqs.q: Do I need any prior experience?
faqs.a: No prior experience is needed. The course is designed for beginners and working professionals.

title: AI Powered Web Development Course
shortDescription: Learn to design, build, and launch modern websites with AI integration
description: The Web Development Course at Pixl Pluz Academy teaches you to build modern, responsive websites and web applications using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, and AI-powered development tools. Work on real projects and build a professional portfolio.

curriculum.title: Module 1: HTML & CSS Foundations
curriculum.description: Start with clean structure and layout. Learn semantic HTML, Flexbox and Grid, responsive breakpoints, and small motion that feels polished — the base every modern product UI still needs.

curriculum.title: Module 2: JavaScript Essentials
curriculum.description: Make pages interactive with modern JavaScript. Cover ES6+ syntax, DOM work, events, and async patterns so you can fetch data and wire product behaviour without guessing.

curriculum.title: Module 3: React Fundamentals
curriculum.description: Build interfaces with components, state, and routing. Practise hooks, forms, and navigation patterns used in real React apps so you can move from static pages to application UI.

curriculum.title: Module 4: UI Systems & Design
curriculum.description: Ship interfaces that look intentional. Work with tokens, typography, reusable patterns, and accessibility so your projects feel product-ready rather than tutorial-only.

curriculum.title: Module 5: APIs & Backend Basics
curriculum.description: Connect frontends to real data. Learn REST, JSON, auth ideas, and simple database concepts, then deploy a small API so your apps talk to a backend with confidence.

curriculum.title: Module 6: AI-Assisted Development
curriculum.description: Use AI pair-programming the way strong teams do — for scaffolding, tests, and refactors — while you stay responsible for architecture, review, and shipping quality.

curriculum.title: Module 7: Full-Stack Project Build
curriculum.description: Assemble a complete product slice: architecture, features, performance, and deployment. Practise debugging under time pressure so your portfolio shows real delivery, not isolated demos.

curriculum.title: Module 8: Portfolio & Career Ready
curriculum.description: Package your work for hiring. Polish a portfolio site, write case studies on GitHub, and rehearse interview-style project walkthroughs with mentor feedback.

faqs.a: No. We start from the very basics and guide you step by step.
You will build 5+ real-world projects including a portfolio site, e-commerce page, and a React application.

title: Data Science & AI Course
shortDescription: Learn how to turn data into decisions and AI into practical skills
description: The Data Science & AI Course covers Python, machine learning, data analysis, visualization, and practical AI model deployment. Designed for students who want to work in the fast-growing data and AI industry.

curriculum.title: Module 1: Introduction to Data Science
curriculum.description: See how data science teams solve problems. Set up your environment, write first analysis scripts, and learn how questions, data, and decisions connect before you dive into heavier tooling.

lessons.title: Setting up your Data Science environment
Writing your first Data Science program
Understanding Data Science syntax and structure

curriculum.title: Module 2: Python for Data Analysis
curriculum.description: Use Python as your analysis workbench. Practise Pandas and NumPy, clean messy tables, and visualise findings so stakeholders can read your story without opening raw files.

curriculum.title: Module 3: Statistics for Data Science
curriculum.description: Ground your insights in statistics that hiring teams expect. Cover descriptive stats, probability, sampling, and intro hypothesis testing so model results are not just black-box scores.

curriculum.title: Module 4: Exploratory Data Analysis
curriculum.description: Explore datasets the way analysts do on real briefs. Build EDA workflows, understand features, and turn charts into narratives that support product or marketing decisions.

curriculum.title: Module 5: Machine Learning Foundations
curriculum.description: Train and evaluate classic ML models with clear metrics. Compare supervised approaches, practise regression and classification, and learn when a simple model beats a complex one.

curriculum.title: Module 6: Applied AI & Generative Tools
curriculum.description: Connect classical ML to practical generative AI. Touch neural network ideas, work with LLMs for analysis support, and design prompt systems that stay useful under review.

curriculum.title: Module 7: Model Deployment
curriculum.description: Move models from notebook to something others can call. Version artefacts, wrap a simple prediction API, monitor outputs, and practise basic cloud deployment steps.

curriculum.title: Module 8: Capstone & Portfolio
curriculum.description: Complete an end-to-end case study with documentation and a portfolio presentation. Show mentors how you framed the problem, chose methods, and explained results clearly.

faqs.q: Will I receive a certificate upon completion?
faqs.a: Yes, you receive a verified certificate upon completing all modules and projects.

faqs.q: What if I have questions during the course?
faqs.a: Weekly Q&A sessions with your mentor are included.

faqs.q: Can I access the course materials after completion?
Do I need any prior programming experience to take this course?
faqs.a: Basic understanding of Python is helpful but not required. We cover all prerequisites.

title: Cyber Security Course with AI
shortDescription: Learn how to protect digital systems, networks, and data
description: The Cybersecurity Course at Pixl Pluz Academy introduces learners to the fundamentals of digital security, network protection, ethical hacking basics, security awareness, and practical cyber defence methods. The course is designed for students and IT learners who want to build a strong foundation in cybersecurity.

curriculum.title: Module 1: Introduction to Cybersecurity
curriculum.description: Learn why security matters and how threats show up in real systems. Cover core principles, common attack types, and network basics so later labs sit on a solid mental model.

curriculum.title: Module 2: Ethical Hacking Basics
curriculum.description: Practise ethical reconnaissance and scanning in controlled labs. Understand scope, permission, and how attackers gather information — so you can defend with the same clarity.

curriculum.title: Module 3: Network Security
curriculum.description: Protect traffic and access paths. Work with firewalls, VPNs, wireless risks, and monitoring tools so you can explain how networks are segmented and observed in practice.

curriculum.title: Module 4: System & Endpoint Defence
curriculum.description: Harden endpoints and reduce easy wins for attackers. Cover OS hardening, malware awareness, patches, and privilege habits that keep workstations and servers safer day to day.

curriculum.title: Module 5: Web Application Security
curriculum.description: See how web apps get broken — and how teams prevent it. Review OWASP-style risks, injection and XSS patterns, secure coding habits, and small pentest labs you can document.

curriculum.title: Module 6: AI for Cyber Defence
curriculum.description: Use AI to speed detection and triage without blind trust. Practise log analysis, assisted threat spotting, and automation habits that help security ops move faster with review built in.

curriculum.title: Module 7: Incident Response
curriculum.description: Respond when something goes wrong. Walk the incident lifecycle, containment and recovery steps, documentation, and a tabletop drill so you practise calm, structured defence.

curriculum.title: Module 8: Capstone Security Lab
curriculum.description: Run a capped defence project from scenario to portfolio. Plan threats, practise hands-on defence, and present your process for career conversations and mentoring feedback.

faqs.q: Will I receive a certificate upon completion?
faqs.a: Yes, you receive a Pixl Pluz Academy certificate upon completing all modules.

faqs.q: What if I have questions during the course?
faqs.a: Access to mentor sessions and a community Discord server is included.

faqs.q: Can I access the course materials after completion?
Do I need any prior programming experience to take this course?
faqs.a: Basic computer literacy is sufficient. We guide you from the fundamentals.
